commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/run_scenario.py --target expense_lite --condition full_boardflow --workspace /tmp/boardflowbench-runner-smoke --oracle-root ../ExpenseLiteBenchOracles --results-dir /tmp/boardflowbench-runner-results --source-repo ../ExpenseLiteBenchDemo
commands_run.notes: Real manual-checkpoint runner smoke initialized from the fixed demo seed.
Repeated across B001-B004; each sticker ran end refresh, deterministic gate, evidence checkpoint, activation, and next start refresh.

tests.name: real Expense Lite B001-B004 full_boardflow smoke
tests.notes: All four isolated oracle stages passed and the final workspace was clean.

tests.name: runner lifecycle unit tests
tests.notes: Covered refresh ordering and external manual checkpoint resume.

decisions: Keep oracle files in a separate sibling Git repository outside agent workspaces.
Bind oracle execution to the target manifest seed SHA and require the oracle pack to have a Git commit.
Support no-board, native instructions, native docs handoff, and full BoardFlow conditions.
Run refresh externally around full BoardFlow sticker sections.
next_recommended_step: Use external result directories for real experiment runs and remove temporary smoke workspaces after verification.
